blended.narrative: Ski Granby Ranch is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. The 14-day outlook shows 6 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 47°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Sunday: 2.7" of snow, highs of 44°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 4.0" of new snow over the past week. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 24".
